name: Tom Matzen
seeking: Partners with impact coaches and industry positioning experts for summit collaborations and mastermind co-hosting. Access to entrepreneurs and consultants scaling their businesses through podcast marketing partnerships and launch support.
who_you_serve: He serves entrepreneurs, business coaches, and consultants who are looking to grow their businesses and make a significant impact in their industries.
what_you_do: Tom Matzen helps entrepreneurs, business coaches, and consultants unleash their potential, scale their businesses, and become industry icons, focusing on impact, influence, and income generation.
offering: Internet Marketing Expert, Joint Venture Resources, Launches for Online Programs, Lead Generation Specialists, Linkedin Training, Marketing Coach, Networking Groups, Podcast Host, Podcast Marketing, Podcast Services, Summit Creation, Webinar Training
bio: Past attendees have praised the workshop for its energy, knowledge, and insights, highlighting its effectiveness in building 6 and 7 figure businesses.
service_provided: Workshops, coaching, podcasting strategies, business development
social_proof: Testimonials from past attendees including industry experts and entrepreneurs.
